title: leontodon montanus subsp. pseudotaraxaci
intro: Leontodon montanus subsp. pseudotaraxaci, also known as a type of dandelion, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
